BackstoryDef.title: Scab Worker
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: During a period of economic tension, [PAWN_nameDef] was transported to a cargo dock to work menial labor while the original workers were on strike. Though looked down upon by everyone, and making even less money than the original workers, [PAWN_pronoun] was able to learn valuable skills during the strike until the original workers grew violent and rioted, burning the shipping dock to the ground while [PAWN_nameDef] and all the other scab workers were displaced across multiple worlds.
